name: PINTEREST, INC.
summary: Pinterest, Inc. operates a visual discovery and inspiration platform where users find ideas related to their interests, tastes, and life moments. The platform is accessible via web and mobile applications, offering features such as a Save button and browser extensions. Pinterest monetizes primarily through advertising, offering advertisers tools to reach users. The company also operates Shuffles, a separate application. Pinterest serves users, advertisers, creators, and publishers globally.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
